div1.entryFree: Rhenish, adj. pertaining to the town of Rheims? or to the river Rhine? Probably the latter: a deep glass of R. wine, Merch. I, 2, 104. more difference between your bloods than there is between red wine and R. III, 1, 44. Substantively: his draughts of R. Hml. I, 4, 10. a flagon of R. V, 1, 197.
